text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
To be the world's strongest... With that goal in her heart, this
Umamusume is taking on all challengers, right here in France!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This international tour of hers is most unprecedented, but the
unwavering strength of her conviction is on full display in this race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now, we've reached the fourth corner and are heading into the
homestretch! After waiting it out on the outside, El Condor Pasa
makes her move!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Wow, oh, wow! She's left last year's Arc Umamusume and Europe's Umamusume of the Year in her dust!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's got this in the bag! Ahead by two, now three lengths, she
crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Triumphing over the giants of the world stage, the winner of the
French G1 Grand Prix de Saint-Cloud is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
EL CONDOR PASA! She's made another dream come true for her fans
back in Japan!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bien! Even across the globe, El's the greatest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And now... I'm one step closer to my goal. The Prix de l'Arc de
Triomphe is finally within my grasp!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Until now just a mere fantasy, her dream of conquering the Prix de
l'Arc de Triomphe feels more and more real!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will El Condor Pasa achieve this magnificent feat and make history?
Her fans the world over are anxious to find out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, El, you're so cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Special Week toppled fearsome foes Seiun Sky and Mejiro
Bright in the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We gather as a team to celebrate her victory.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Before we begin, let's hear a few words from Special Week,
the star of today's show!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You go, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Give us a good speech!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, u-ummm! These consecutive wins are all thanks to my
teammates'—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Cheers to that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha-huh?! Ch-cheeeers!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, Spe's been in the news a whole lot lately.
Everyone's saying the Golden Generation's Derby Umamusume is the
real deal!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and your showing at the spring Tenno Sho really helped.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You've always had talent, but now you're able to put all that talent on
display when you run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Do you mean that?! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
To be perfectly honest, I feel like I've changed a lot too! It's like... I
can run with confidence or something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's senior year is off to a spectacular start with a
three-race win streak, including the G1 spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From her smile, it seems her superb physical condition has spilled
over into her emotional state as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We also have a present for our talented Special Week... Well, rather
than a "present," I should say we have some wonderful news.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What kind of news?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: In the Takarazuka Kinen fan polls... you ranked number one, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha... what?! I-I'm number one?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
That may sound a tad scary, but that should tell you just how amazing
you've been doing up until now.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You've grown so much that fans want to support you the most.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Is that so...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it, compared to when you first transferred in, you're way more reliable now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Do you really think so?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But you've got lots and LOTS of races ahead of you... so make sure
you stuff yourself silly with this here banquet! Fine food makes fine
racers!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A fine racer... I see what you mean! Then I better not let any of this
fine food go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! Whether it be the Takarazuka Kinen or this food, I'll show no
mercy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, thanks, everyone! Today was really special!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Maybe this goes without saying, but both my stomach and heart feel full after hearing you all say such nice things about me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So now I'm ready to give training even more of my all and make my
dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
How exactly I'll become the best in Japan still isn't totally clear to
me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But even if it's just to pay you all back for your love and support, I'll
make sure it happens!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Awwww! That's so noble of you, Spe! We'll be cheering you on the
whole waaay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, we will do everything in our power to help. Seeing you
become the best racer in Japan will more than suffice as thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Continuing her stellar performance will be no easy task, especially
considering Special Week's generation has been called the Golden
Generation for some time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, she's already suffered a number of bitter defeats at their
hands... but Special Week has always bounced back.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So if I want to make my dream come true—if I really want to be the
best—I need to keep running like I did today!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, starting tomorrow, I'm putting you through the ringer, got it?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, starting tomorrow, I'm putting you through the ringer, got it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The best in Japan... a lofty ambition, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But tonight has only served to renew my resolve—I'll do whatever it
takes to see her dream made reality.
